{{Quote|Looks like the Kem Stor Ai dispute will be the next to boil over.|[[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Cha Niathal]]|<ref name="Sacrifice" />}}
'''Kem Stor Ai''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tennuutta sector/Legends|Tennuutta sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
{{Quote|Anxious times for us, when Murkhana challenges our markets, and now Kem Stor Ai talks of war with Murkhana, which is too close for the hives' taste.|[[Sass Sikili]] to [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="Sacrifice" />}}
Kem Stor Ai talked of war with the planet [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] during the turmoil of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. The eruption of a conflict between the two worlds was of great concern for the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] who thought that Murkhana could use this conflict to attack the [[Roche asteroid field]].<ref name="Sacrifice" />
